Allen Lee@Collections

单目标无约束优化

最优化问题的一般形式为:

min⁡f(x)s.t.f:Rn→R  ;x∈X\begin{aligned} & \min f(\mathbf{x})\\ & s.t.\quad f: \mathbb{R}^n\rightarrow\mathbb{R}\;;\mathbf{x} \in X \end{aligned}​minf(x)s.t.f:Rn→R;x∈X​

其中x\mathbf{x}x为决策变量，f(x)f(\mathbf{x})f(x)是目标函数，XXX为约束集或可行域。

若f:Rn→Rf: \mathbb{R}^n\rightarrow\mathbb{R}f:Rn→R则是单目标优化； 若X=RnX=\mathbf{R}^nX=Rn，则最优化问题成为无约束最优化问题


所有无约束优化方法，都可以写成迭代法的形式，其基本思想是：给定一个初始点x0\mathbf{x}_0x0​，按照某一迭代规则产生一个点列{xn}\{\mathbf{x}_n\}{xn​}，使得当{xn}\{\mathbf{x}_n\}{xn​}是有穷点列时，其最后一个点是最优化模型问题的最优解。

迭代规则由迭代公式决定，迭代公式的基本表示形式如下

xk+1=xk+αkdk\mathbf{x}_{k+1}=\mathbf{x}_k+\alpha_k\mathbf{d}_kxk+1​=xk​+αk​dk​

式中，αk\alpha_kαk​为步长因子，dk\mathbf{d}_kdk​为搜索方向


最优化方法的基本结构:

  • 给定初始点x0\mathbf{x}_0x0​
  • 确定搜索方向dk\mathbf{d}_kdk​，即按照一定规则，构造fff在xk\mathbf{x}_kxk​点处的下降方向作为搜索方向
  • 确定步长因子αk\alpha_kαk​，使目标函数有某种意义的下降
    • 对于一维线搜素子问题，有:
      • αk=arg⁡min⁡λ>0ϕ(x)\alpha_k=\arg\min\limits_{\lambda > 0} \phi(x)αk​=argλ>0min​ϕ(x)，其中ϕ(λ)=f(xk+λdk)\phi(\lambda)=f(\mathbf{x}_k+\lambda\mathbf{d}_k)ϕ(λ)=f(xk​+λdk​)
      • ϕ′(λ)=∇f(xk+λdk)Tdk\phi'(\lambda)=\nabla f(x_k+\lambda d_k)^T d_kϕ′(λ)=∇f(xk​+λdk​)Tdk​

确定搜索方向

最速下降法

给定: 初始点x0x_0x0​，误差ε>0\varepsilon > 0ε>0

输出: 最优点

优点: 每一步都能保证函数值下降；实现简单，计算成本低

缺点: 收敛速度慢，路径呈“锯齿”状；会掉入局部最优

k=0while(true):计算dk=−∇f(xk)if∥∇f(xk)∥<ε  ;returnxkelse确定步长因子  λk>0xk+1=xk+λkdkk=k+1\begin{aligned} & k=0\\ & \text{while(true):}\\ & \hspace{2em}\text{计算}\quad d_k=-\nabla f(x_k)\\ & \hspace{2em}\text{if}\quad \|\nabla f(x_k)\|<\varepsilon\;;\text{return}\quad x_k\\ & \hspace{2em}\text{else}\\ & \hspace{2em}\hspace{2em}\text{确定步长因子}\;\lambda_k>0\\ & \hspace{2em}\hspace{2em}x_{k+1}=x_k+\lambda_k d_k\\ & \hspace{2em}\hspace{2em}k=k+1 \end{aligned}​k=0while(true):计算dk​=−∇f(xk​)if∥∇f(xk​)∥<ε;returnxk​else确定步长因子λk​>0xk+1​=xk​+λk​dk​k=k+1​

牛顿法

给定: 初始点x0x_0x0​，误差ε>0\varepsilon > 0ε>0

输出: 最优点

优点: 收敛速度极快；自带步长估计

缺点: 计算(O(n3)O(n^3)O(n3))和存储(O(n2)O(n^2)O(n2))成本高；对初始点敏感；会掉入局部最优

k=0while(true):if∥∇f(xk)∥<ε  ;returnxkHk=∇2f(xk)Bk=HkifHk不是正定矩阵Bk=正定化Hkdk=−Bk−1∇f(xk)经典牛顿xk+1=xk+dkk=k+1带线搜索牛顿确定步长因子λkxk+1=xk+λkdkk=k+1\begin{aligned} & k=0\\ & \text{while(true):}\\ & \hspace{2em}\text{if}\quad \|\nabla f(x_k)\|<\varepsilon\;;\text{return}\quad x_k\\ & \hspace{2em}H_k=\nabla^2 f(x_k)\\ & \hspace{2em}B_k=H_k\\ & \hspace{2em}\text{if}\quad H_k\text{不是正定矩阵}\\ & \hspace{2em}\hspace{2em}B_k=\text{正定化}H_k\\ & \hspace{2em}d_k=-B_k^{-1}\nabla f(x_k)\\ & \text{经典牛顿}\\ & \hspace{2em}x_{k+1}=x_k+d_k\\ & \hspace{2em}k=k+1\\ & \text{带线搜索牛顿}\\ & \hspace{2em}\text{确定步长因子}\lambda_k\\ & \hspace{2em}x_{k+1}=x_k+\lambda_k d_k\\ & \hspace{2em}k=k+1 \end{aligned}​k=0while(true):if∥∇f(xk​)∥<ε;returnxk​Hk​=∇2f(xk​)Bk​=Hk​ifHk​不是正定矩阵Bk​=正定化Hk​dk​=−Bk−1​∇f(xk​)经典牛顿xk+1​=xk​+dk​k=k+1带线搜索牛顿确定步长因子λk​xk+1​=xk​+λk​dk​k=k+1​

阻尼高斯-牛顿法

专门用来解非线性最小二乘问题。即形如f(x)=12∑i=1mri(x)2=12∥r(x)∥2f(x)=\frac{1}{2}\sum\limits_{i=1}^{m} r_i(x)^2=\frac{1}{2}\|r(x)\|^2f(x)=21​i=1∑m​ri​(x)2=21​∥r(x)∥2，其中ri(x)r_i(x)ri​(x)是残差函数且至少一个非线性

给定: 初始点x0x_0x0​，误差ε>0\varepsilon > 0ε>0

输出: 最优点

优点: 无需计算完整的海森矩阵；收敛速度快

缺点: 对大残差问题效果差甚至可能不收敛；要求雅可比矩阵列满秩；只能处理平方和形式的目标函数

k=0while(true):fk=(r1(x),r2(x),...,rm(x))TAk=(∇r1(xk),∇r2(xk),...,∇rm(xk))if∥AkTfk∥<εreturnxkdk=−(AkTAk)−1AkTfk确定步长因子λkxk+1=xk+λkdkk=k+1\begin{aligned} & k=0\\ & \text{while(true):}\\ & \hspace{2em}f_k=(r_1(x), r_2(x), ..., r_m(x))^T\\ & \hspace{2em}A_k=(\nabla r_1(x_k), \nabla r_2(x_k), ..., \nabla r_m(x_k))\\ & \hspace{2em}\text{if}\quad \|A_k^T f_k\|<\varepsilon\\ & \hspace{2em}\hspace{2em}\text{return}\quad x_k\\ & \hspace{2em}d_k=-(A_k^T A_k)^{-1}A_k^T f_k\\ & \hspace{2em}\text{确定步长因子}\lambda_k\\ & \hspace{2em}x_{k+1}=x_k+\lambda_k d_k\\ & \hspace{2em}k=k+1\\ \end{aligned}​k=0while(true):fk​=(r1​(x),r2​(x),...,rm​(x))TAk​=(∇r1​(xk​),∇r2​(xk​),...,∇rm​(xk​))if∥AkT​fk​∥<εreturnxk​dk​=−(AkT​Ak​)−1AkT​fk​确定步长因子λk​xk+1​=xk​+λk​dk​k=k+1​

Levenberg-Marquardt 法

专门用来解非线性最小二乘问题。即形如f(x)=12∑i=1mri(x)2=12∥r(x)∥2f(x)=\frac{1}{2}\sum\limits_{i=1}^{m} r_i(x)^2=\frac{1}{2}\|r(x)\|^2f(x)=21​i=1∑m​ri​(x)2=21​∥r(x)∥2，其中ri(x)r_i(x)ri​(x)是残差函数且至少一个非线性

给定: 初始点x0x_0x0​，误差ε>0\varepsilon > 0ε>0，α0>0\alpha_0>0α0​>0，β>1\beta>1β>1

输出: 最优点

优点: 保证了系数矩阵总是正定、可逆的，不要求雅可比矩阵列满秩；能在 Gauss-Newton 和最速下降之间平滑切换；对大残差问题更稳健

缺点: 当α\alphaα很大时效率低；α\alphaα调节策略依赖经验

k=0while(true):fk=(r1(x),r2(x),...,rm(x))TAk=(∇r1(xk),∇r2(xk),...,∇rm(xk))if∥AkTfk∥<εreturnxkdk=−(AkTAk+αI)−1(AkTfk)iff(xk+dk)<f(xk)αk+1=αkβxk+1=xk+dkelseαk+1=βαkxk+1=xkk=k+1\begin{aligned} & k=0\\ & \text{while(true):}\\ & \hspace{2em}f_k=(r_1(x), r_2(x), ..., r_m(x))^T\\ & \hspace{2em}A_k=(\nabla r_1(x_k), \nabla r_2(x_k), ..., \nabla r_m(x_k))\\ & \hspace{2em}\text{if}\quad \|A_k^T f_k\|<\varepsilon\\ & \hspace{2em}\hspace{2em}\text{return}\quad x_k\\ & \hspace{2em}d_k=-(A_k^T A_k+\alpha I)^{-1}(A_k^T f_k)\\ & \hspace{2em}\text{if}\quad f(x_k+d_k)<f(x_k)\\ & \hspace{2em}\hspace{2em}\alpha_{k+1}=\frac{\alpha_k}{\beta}\\ & \hspace{2em}\hspace{2em}x_{k+1}=x_k+d_k\\ & \hspace{2em}\text{else}\\ & \hspace{2em}\hspace{2em}\alpha_{k+1}=\beta\alpha_k\\ & \hspace{2em}\hspace{2em}x_{k+1}=x_k\\ & \hspace{2em}k=k+1 \end{aligned}​k=0while(true):fk​=(r1​(x),r2​(x),...,rm​(x))TAk​=(∇r1​(xk​),∇r2​(xk​),...,∇rm​(xk​))if∥AkT​fk​∥<εreturnxk​dk​=−(AkT​Ak​+αI)−1(AkT​fk​)iff(xk​+dk​)<f(xk​)αk+1​=βαk​​xk+1​=xk​+dk​elseαk+1​=βαk​xk+1​=xk​k=k+1​

共轭梯度法

给定: 初始点x0x_0x0​，误差ε>0\varepsilon > 0ε>0

输出: 最优点

优点: 收敛速度远快于最速下降法；存储和计算成本较低

缺点: 严重依赖线搜索精度；必须加入重启机制（如每n步或方向上升时强行重置为最速下降方向）；会掉入局部最优

k=0while(true):if∥∇f(xk)∥<ε  ;returnxkFk−1=∇f(xk−1)Fk=∇f(xk)CW公式dk={−Fkk=0−Fk+FkT(Fk−Fk−1)dk−1T(Fk−Fk−1)dk−1k≠0FR公式dk={−Fkk=0−Fk+FkTFkFk−1TFk−1dk−1k≠0PRP公式dk={−Fkk=0−Fk+FkT[Fk−Fk−1]Fk−1TFk−1dk−1k≠0Dixon公式dk={−Fkk=0−Fk−FkTFkFk−1Tdk−1dk−1k≠0DY公式dk={−Fkk=0−Fk+FkTFkdk−1[Fk−Fk−1]Tdk−1k≠0确定步长因子λkxk+1=xk+λkdkk=k+1\begin{aligned} & k=0\\ & \text{while(true):}\\ & \hspace{2em}\text{if}\quad \|\nabla f(x_k)\|<\varepsilon\;;\text{return}\quad x_k\\ & \hspace{2em}F_{k-1}=\nabla f(x_{k-1})\\ & \hspace{2em}F_k=\nabla f(x_k)\\ & \text{CW公式}\\ & \hspace{2em}d_k= \begin{cases} -F_k & k=0 \\ -F_k+\frac{F_k^T(F_k-F_{k-1})}{d_{k-1}^T(F_k-F_{k-1})}d_{k-1} & k\neq 0 \\ \end{cases}\\ & \text{FR公式}\\ & \hspace{2em}d_k= \begin{cases} -F_k & k=0 \\ -F_k+\frac{F_k^T F_k}{F_{k-1}^T F_{k-1}}d_{k-1} & k\neq 0 \\ \end{cases}\\ & \text{PRP公式}\\ & \hspace{2em}d_k= \begin{cases} -F_k & k=0 \\ -F_k+\frac{F_k^T [F_k-F_{k-1}]}{F_{k-1}^T F_{k-1}}d_{k-1} & k\neq 0 \\ \end{cases}\\ & \text{Dixon公式}\\ & \hspace{2em}d_k= \begin{cases} -F_k & k=0 \\ -F_k-\frac{F_k^T F_k}{F_{k-1}^T d_{k-1}}d_{k-1} & k\neq 0 \\ \end{cases}\\ & \text{DY公式}\\ & \hspace{2em}d_k= \begin{cases} -F_k & k=0 \\ -F_k+\frac{F_k^T F_k}{d_{k-1} [F_k-F_{k-1}]^T}d_{k-1} & k\neq 0 \\ \end{cases}\\ & \hspace{2em}\text{确定步长因子}\lambda_k\\ & \hspace{2em}x_{k+1}=x_k+\lambda_k d_k\\ & \hspace{2em}k=k+1 \end{aligned}​k=0while(true):if∥∇f(xk​)∥<ε;returnxk​Fk−1​=∇f(xk−1​)Fk​=∇f(xk​)CW公式dk​={−Fk​−Fk​+dk−1T​(Fk​−Fk−1​)FkT​(Fk​−Fk−1​)​dk−1​​k=0k=0​FR公式dk​={−Fk​−Fk​+Fk−1T​Fk−1​FkT​Fk​​dk−1​​k=0k=0​PRP公式dk​={−Fk​−Fk​+Fk−1T​Fk−1​FkT​[Fk​−Fk−1​]​dk−1​​k=0k=0​Dixon公式dk​={−Fk​−Fk​−Fk−1T​dk−1​FkT​Fk​​dk−1​​k=0k=0​DY公式dk​={−Fk​−Fk​+dk−1​[Fk​−Fk−1​]TFkT​Fk​​dk−1​​k=0k=0​确定步长因子λk​xk+1​=xk​+λk​dk​k=k+1​

以上公式在函数为二次型，且使用精准线搜时完全等价。 实际使用中，常使用 FR 和 PRP，因为这两个公式只需要梯度信息。尤其 PRP，数值表现更好

拟牛顿法

给定: 初始点x0x_0x0​，误差ε>0\varepsilon > 0ε>0，H0H_0H0​(通常为单位矩阵III)

输出: 最优点

优点: 计算效率非常接近牛顿法；存储和计算成本可控(O(n2)O(n^2)O(n2))，对于大规模问题，还有有限记忆拟牛顿法(L-BFGS)；算法的全局收敛性非常好

缺点: 对线搜索精度敏感；在非凸问题中可能失效；会掉入局部最优

k=0while(true):dk=−Hk∇f(xk)使用 Wolfe 准则确定步长因子λkxk+1=xk+λkdkif∥∇f(xk+1)∥<εreturnxkelseSk=xk+1−xkγk=∇f(xk+1)−∇f(xk)DFP法Hk+1=Hk−(Hkγk)(γkTHk)γkTHkγk+SkSkTγkTSkBFGS法ρk=1γkTSkHk+1=(I−ρkSkγkT)Hk(I−ρkγkSkT)+ρkSkSkTk=k+1\begin{aligned} & k=0\\ & \text{while(true):}\\ & \hspace{2em}d_k=-H_k\nabla f(x_k)\\ & \hspace{2em}\text{使用 Wolfe 准则确定步长因子}\lambda_k\\ & \hspace{2em}x_{k+1}=x_k+\lambda_k d_k\\ & \hspace{2em}\text{if}\quad \|\nabla f(x_{k+1})\|<\varepsilon\\ & \hspace{2em}\hspace{2em}\text{return}\quad x_k\\ & \hspace{2em}\text{else}\\ & \hspace{2em}\hspace{2em}S_k=x_{k+1}-x_k\\ & \hspace{2em}\hspace{2em}\gamma_k=\nabla f(x_{k+1})-\nabla f(x_k)\\ & \text{DFP法}\\ & \hspace{2em}\hspace{2em}H_{k+1}=H_k-\frac{(H_k \gamma_k)(\gamma_k^T H_k)}{\gamma_k^T H_k \gamma_k}+\frac{S_k S_k^T}{\gamma_k^T S_k}\\ & \text{BFGS法}\\ & \hspace{2em}\hspace{2em}\rho_k = \frac{1}{\gamma_k^T S_k}\\ & \hspace{2em}\hspace{2em}H_{k+1}=(I-\rho_k S_k \gamma_k^T)H_k(I-\rho_k \gamma_k S_k^T)+\rho_k S_k S_k^T\\ & \hspace{2em}\hspace{2em}k=k+1 \end{aligned}​k=0while(true):dk​=−Hk​∇f(xk​)使用 Wolfe 准则确定步长因子λk​xk+1​=xk​+λk​dk​if∥∇f(xk+1​)∥<εreturnxk​elseSk​=xk+1​−xk​γk​=∇f(xk+1​)−∇f(xk​)DFP法Hk+1​=Hk​−γkT​Hk​γk​(Hk​γk​)(γkT​Hk​)​+γkT​Sk​Sk​SkT​​BFGS法ρk​=γkT​Sk​1​Hk+1​=(I−ρk​Sk​γkT​)Hk​(I−ρk​γk​SkT​)+ρk​Sk​SkT​k=k+1​

信赖域法

给定: 初始点x0x_0x0​，误差ε>0\varepsilon > 0ε>0，信赖域Δ^\hat{\Delta}Δ^，初始半径δ0∈(0,Δ^)\delta_0\in(0, \hat{\Delta})δ0​∈(0,Δ^)，参数0<η1≤η2<10<\eta_1\leq\eta_2<10<η1​≤η2​<1，0<γ1<1<γ20<\gamma_1<1<\gamma_20<γ1​<1<γ2​

输出: 最优点

优点: 能处理非正定海森矩阵，全局收敛性强；适合困难的非凸问题

缺点: 子问题求解成本较高；对精度和初始值敏感；会掉入局部最优

k=0while(true):if∥∇f(xk)∥<ε  ;returnxk求解子问题(近似解即可)min⁡qk(d)=f(xk)+∇f(xk)Td+12dTH(xk)ds.t.∥d∥≤δk  得  dkρk=f(xk)−f(xk+dk)qk(0)−qk(dk)ifρk<η1xk+1=xkelsexk+1=xk+dkδk+1={γ1δkρk<η1δkη1≤ρk<η2min⁡{γ2δk,Δ^}ρk≥η2k=k+1\begin{aligned} & k=0\\ & \text{while(true):}\\ & \hspace{2em}\text{if}\quad \|\nabla f(x_k)\|<\varepsilon\;;\text{return}\quad x_k\\ & \hspace{2em} \begin{aligned} \text{求解子问题(近似解即可)}\min q_k(d)&=f(x_k)+\nabla f(x_k)^T d+\frac{1}{2}d^T\mathbf{H}(x_k)d\\ \text{s.t.}\quad\|d\|&\leq\delta_k\;\text{得}\;d_k\\ \end{aligned}\\ & \hspace{2em}\rho_k=\frac{f(x_k)-f(x_k+d_k)}{q_k(0)-q_k(d_k)}\\ & \hspace{2em}\text{if}\quad \rho_k<\eta_1\\ & \hspace{2em}\hspace{2em}x_{k+1}=x_k\\ & \hspace{2em}\text{else}\\ & \hspace{2em}\hspace{2em}x_{k+1}=x_k+d_k\\ & \hspace{2em}\delta_{k+1}= \begin{cases} \gamma_1\delta_k & \rho_k<\eta_1 \\ \delta_k & \eta_1\leq\rho_k<\eta_2 \\ \min\{\gamma_2 \delta_k, \hat{\Delta}\} & \rho_k\geq\eta_2 \\ \end{cases}\\ & \hspace{2em}k=k+1 \end{aligned}​k=0while(true):if∥∇f(xk​)∥<ε;returnxk​求解子问题(近似解即可)minqk​(d)s.t.∥d∥​=f(xk​)+∇f(xk​)Td+21​dTH(xk​)d≤δk​得dk​​ρk​=qk​(0)−qk​(dk​)f(xk​)−f(xk​+dk​)​ifρk​<η1​xk+1​=xk​elsexk+1​=xk​+dk​δk+1​=⎩⎨⎧​γ1​δk​δk​min{γ2​δk​,Δ^}​ρk​<η1​η1​≤ρk​<η2​ρk​≥η2​​k=k+1​

确定步长因子

准则只提供判别条件，步长迭代逻辑可以自定义

黄金分割

给定: 区间[a0,b0][a_0, b_0][a0​,b0​]，精度ε>0\varepsilon > 0ε>0，且f(x)f(x)f(x)在区间内为单峰函数

输出: 精确步长λ\lambdaλ

优点: 不需要f(x)f(x)f(x)可导，保证输出步长为最优

缺点: 计算代价高昂

ifb0−a0<ε  ;returnλ=a0+b02t0=a0+0.382(b0−a0);  S0=a0+0.618(b0−a0);  k=0while(true):ifϕ(tk)>ϕ(Sk):ifbk−tk<ε  ;returnλ=Skelseak+1=tk  ;bk+1=bktk+1=Sk  ;Sk+1=ak+1+0.618(bk+1−ak+1)elseifSk−ak<ε  ;returnλ=tkelseak+1=ak  ;bk+1=SkSk+1=tk  ;tk+1=ak+1+0.382(bk+1−ak+1)k=k+1\begin{aligned} & \text{if}\quad b_0 - a_0 < \varepsilon\; ; \text{return}\quad \lambda = \frac{a_0 + b_0}{2}\\ & t_0=a_0+0.382(b_0-a_0);\; S_0=a_0+0.618(b_0-a_0);\; k=0\\ & \text{while(true):}\\ & \hspace{2em}\text{if}\quad \phi(t_k) > \phi(S_k)\text{:}\\ & \hspace{2em}\hspace{2em}\text{if}\quad b_k-t_k<\varepsilon\;; \text{return}\quad \lambda=S_k\\ & \hspace{2em}\hspace{2em}\text{else}\\ & \hspace{2em}\hspace{2em}\hspace{2em}a_{k+1}=t_k\;;b_{k+1}=b_k\\ & \hspace{2em}\hspace{2em}\hspace{2em}t_{k+1}=S_k\;;S_{k+1}=a_{k+1}+0.618(b_{k+1}-a_{k+1})\\ & \hspace{2em}\text{else}\\ & \hspace{2em}\hspace{2em}\text{if}\quad S_k-a_k<\varepsilon\;; \text{return}\quad \lambda=t_k\\ & \hspace{2em}\hspace{2em}\text{else}\\ & \hspace{2em}\hspace{2em}\hspace{2em}a_{k+1}=a_k\;;b_{k+1}=S_k\\ & \hspace{2em}\hspace{2em}\hspace{2em}S_{k+1}=t_k\;;t_{k+1}=a_{k+1}+0.382(b_{k+1}-a_{k+1})\\ & \hspace{2em}k=k+1 \end{aligned}​ifb0​−a0​<ε;returnλ=2a0​+b0​​t0​=a0​+0.382(b0​−a0​);S0​=a0​+0.618(b0​−a0​);k=0while(true):ifϕ(tk​)>ϕ(Sk​):ifbk​−tk​<ε;returnλ=Sk​elseak+1​=tk​;bk+1​=bk​tk+1​=Sk​;Sk+1​=ak+1​+0.618(bk+1​−ak+1​)elseifSk​−ak​<ε;returnλ=tk​elseak+1​=ak​;bk+1​=Sk​Sk+1​=tk​;tk+1​=ak+1​+0.382(bk+1​−ak+1​)k=k+1​

Armijo 准则

给定: ρ>0\rho > 0ρ>0，σ,γ∈(0,1)\sigma, \gamma \in (0,1)σ,γ∈(0,1)，当前搜索方向dkd_kdk​，当前迭代点xkx_kxk​

输出: 步长λ\lambdaλ

优点: 计算量小

缺点: 只管下降量，不管步长本身。即极小步长λϵ\lambda_\epsilonλϵ​往往也能轻松满足，导致算法迭代速度过慢

m0=0z(a)=aσ∇f(xk)Tdkwhile(true):ifϕ(ργmk)−f(xk)≤z(ργmk)  ;returnλ=ργmkelsemk=mk+1\begin{aligned} & m_0=0\\ & z(a)=a\sigma\nabla f(x_k)^T d_k\\ & \text{while(true):}\\ & \hspace{2em}\text{if}\quad \phi(\rho\gamma^{m_k})-f(x_k)\leq z(\rho\gamma^{m_k})\;; \text{return}\quad \lambda=\rho\gamma^{m_k}\\ & \hspace{2em}\text{else}\\ & \hspace{2em}\hspace{2em}m_k=m_k+1 \end{aligned}​m0​=0z(a)=aσ∇f(xk​)Tdk​while(true):ifϕ(ργmk​)−f(xk​)≤z(ργmk​);returnλ=ργmk​elsemk​=mk​+1​

Goldstein 准则

给定: 区间[a0,b0][a_0, b_0][a0​,b0​]和λ0∈[a0,b0]\lambda_0 \in [a_0, b_0]λ0​∈[a0​,b0​]，σ∈(0,12)\sigma \in (0, \frac{1}{2})σ∈(0,21​)

输出: 步长λ\lambdaλ

优点: 计算量小，能有效的避免过小步长

缺点: 需要外推定界来提供有效的初始区间；可能会把ϕ(λ)\phi(\lambda)ϕ(λ)的真实极小值点也排除在外，基本被 Wolfe 替代

k=0while(true):ifϕ(λk)−ϕ(0)>σλkϕ′(0)ak+1=ak  ;bk+1=λkelseifϕ(λk)−ϕ(0)<(1−σ)λkϕ′(0)ak+1=λk  ;bk+1=bkelsereturnλ=λkλk+1=ak+1+bk+12k=k+1\begin{aligned} & k=0\\ & \text{while(true):}\\ & \hspace{2em}\text{if}\quad \phi(\lambda_k)-\phi(0)>\sigma\lambda_k\phi'(0)\\ & \hspace{2em}\hspace{2em}a_{k+1}=a_k\;;b_{k+1}=\lambda_k\\ & \hspace{2em}\text{else}\\ & \hspace{2em}\hspace{2em}\text{if}\quad \phi(\lambda_k)-\phi(0)<(1-\sigma)\lambda_k\phi'(0)\\ & \hspace{2em}\hspace{2em}\hspace{2em}a_{k+1}=\lambda_k\;;b_{k+1}=b_k\\ & \hspace{2em}\hspace{2em}\text{else}\\ & \hspace{2em}\hspace{2em}\hspace{2em}\text{return}\quad \lambda=\lambda_k\\ & \hspace{2em}\lambda_{k+1}=\frac{a_{k+1}+b_{k+1}}{2}\\ & \hspace{2em}k=k+1\\ \end{aligned}​k=0while(true):ifϕ(λk​)−ϕ(0)>σλk​ϕ′(0)ak+1​=ak​;bk+1​=λk​elseifϕ(λk​)−ϕ(0)<(1−σ)λk​ϕ′(0)ak+1​=λk​;bk+1​=bk​elsereturnλ=λk​λk+1​=2ak+1​+bk+1​​k=k+1​

Wolfe 准则

给定: 区间[a0,b0][a_0, b_0][a0​,b0​]和λ0∈(a0,b0)\lambda_0 \in (a_0, b_0)λ0​∈(a0​,b0​)，σ∈(0,12)\sigma \in (0, \frac{1}{2})σ∈(0,21​)，δ∈(σ,1)\delta \in (\sigma, 1)δ∈(σ,1)，当前搜索方向dkd_kdk​，当前迭代点xkx_kxk​

输出: 步长λ\lambdaλ

优点: 最后得出的步长比较合理，且收敛有保证

缺点: 需要外推定界来提供有效的初始区间；实现较为复杂

while(true):ifϕ(λk)−ϕ(ak)>σλkϕ′(ak)ak+1=ak  ;bk+1=λkz=1+ϕ(ak)−ϕ(λk)(λk−ak)ϕ′(ak)λk+1=ak+λk−ak2zelseifϕ′(λk)≥δϕ′(ak)  ;returnλ=λkelseak+1=λk  ;bk+1=bkλk+1=λk+(λk−ak)ϕ′(λk)ϕ′(ak)−ϕ′(λk)\begin{aligned} & \text{while(true):}\\ & \hspace{2em}\text{if}\quad \phi(\lambda_k)-\phi(a_k)>\sigma\lambda_k\phi'(a_k)\\ & \hspace{2em}\hspace{2em}a_{k+1}=a_k\;;b_{k+1}=\lambda_k\\ & \hspace{2em}\hspace{2em}z=1+\frac{\phi(a_k)-\phi(\lambda_k)}{(\lambda_k-a_k)\phi'(a_k)}\\ & \hspace{2em}\hspace{2em}\lambda_{k+1}=a_k+\frac{\lambda_k-a_k}{2z}\\ & \hspace{2em}\text{else}\\ & \hspace{2em}\hspace{2em}\text{if}\quad \phi'(\lambda_k)\geq\delta\phi'(a_k)\;; \text{return}\quad \lambda=\lambda_k\\ & \hspace{2em}\hspace{2em}\text{else}\\ & \hspace{2em}\hspace{2em}\hspace{2em}a_{k+1}=\lambda_k\;;b_{k+1}=b_k\\ & \hspace{2em}\hspace{2em}\hspace{2em}\lambda_{k+1}=\lambda_k+\frac{(\lambda_k-a_k)\phi'(\lambda_k)}{\phi'(a_k)-\phi'(\lambda_k)} \end{aligned}​while(true):ifϕ(λk​)−ϕ(ak​)>σλk​ϕ′(ak​)ak+1​=ak​;bk+1​=λk​z=1+(λk​−ak​)ϕ′(ak​)ϕ(ak​)−ϕ(λk​)​λk+1​=ak​+2zλk​−ak​​elseifϕ′(λk​)≥δϕ′(ak​);returnλ=λk​elseak+1​=λk​;bk+1​=bk​λk+1​=λk​+ϕ′(ak​)−ϕ′(λk​)(λk​−ak​)ϕ′(λk​)​​
